case_title: CARACTER, LEXIE vs. THE CALIFORNIA LEGAL GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARACTER, LEXIE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CALIFORNIA LEGAL GROUP MAINENTI, RICHARD J
